# Merwan Birem

> AI Innovation Leader · Computer Vision · Industrial AI · Belgium

Merwan Birem is a Senior Research Engineer and Project Leader at Flanders Make (Leuven, Belgium),
specializing in computer vision, visual SLAM, sensor fusion, and industrial AI systems.
He has 10+ years of R&D experience and has led multi-million euro collaborative research programs
involving academia, industry, and public research organizations.

## Professional

- **Current role**: Project Leader & Senior Research Engineer – AI Innovation at Flanders Make (Apr 2022–present)
- **Previous**: Research Engineer at Flanders Make (2018–2022), Research Engineer at Flanders' DRIVE (2015–2017)
- **PhD**: Electronics & System Architecture, Blaise Pascal University / Institut Pascal, France (2011–2015)
  - Thesis: Embedded vision systems for mobile robotics
- **MSc**: Robotics & Multisensory Perception, Blaise Pascal University (2010–2011)
- **Engineering degree**: Electronics, National Polytechnic School of Algiers, Algeria (2005–2010)

## Research Focus

Computer Vision (2D/3D), Visual SLAM, Sensor Fusion, Deep Learning, Object Detection,
Pose Estimation, AR/VR for Industry, Quality Monitoring, AI Workflow Automation, MLOps

## Key Projects

- **ALARMM SBO** (2025–present): 4M€ project on low-cost robust visual SLAM for large industrial environments. 4 research groups, 7 industrial partners.
- **QUALMA ICON** (2022–2025): Modular AI framework for large-scale manual assembly inspection combining detection, pose estimation, tracking, and AR guidance. 4× technology transfer to industry.
- **FROGS ICON** (2021–2023): Vision-based post-grasp validation for robotic kitting using YOLO, ICP, and sensor fusion.

## Publications

20+ peer-reviewed publications in computer vision, robotics, and industrial AI.
Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=oikUY4YAAAAJ

Selected recent papers:
- "Real-Time Warehouse Monitoring with Ceiling Cameras and Digital Twin" (Logistics, 2025)
- "Benchmarking Localization and Operator Tracking" (2025)
- "CAD2GraspMonitor: Vision-based Robotic Grasp Monitoring" (ARCI 2024)
- "Industry 5.0 Quality Inspection" (2024)

## Languages

English (fluent), French (fluent), Arabic (native), Dutch (intermediate)

## Location

Sterrebeek, Belgium. Open to remote collaborations, speaking engagements, and research partnerships.
Contact: merwan.birem@gmail.com
